features.name: Backend startup
features.description: Backend starts correctly with config.py, .env, and agent harness files

features.name: Database initialization
features.description: SQLite database creates tables correctly on startup

features.name: RAG knowledge base
features.description: ChromaDB loads and queries knowledge base

features.name: DeepSeek chat
features.description: Chat endpoint returns LLM responses via DeepSeek API

features.name: Meal recording
features.description: record_agent extracts meal data and saves to database

features.name: Streaming chat (SSE)
features.description: POST /api/chat/stream returns Server-Sent Events for real-time response

features.name: Markdown rendering
features.description: Frontend renders Markdown in chat messages and recipes

features.name: Citation panel
features.description: Chat shows RAG source citations when available

features.name: Recipe persistence
features.description: Recipes auto-save, persist across sessions, and respect daily refresh logic

features.name: Export functionality
features.description: Recipes can be exported as PNG/PDF

features.name: Frontend startup
features.description: Next.js dev server starts without errors

features.name: End-to-end chat
features.description: User can send message and receive streaming response with Markdown
features.notes: Fixed by simplifying RECORD_TOOLS to stay under Windows request size limit (~1200 bytes)

features.name: Toast notification
features.description: Show toast notification when food/exercise is recorded successfully

features.name: Progress bar colors
features.description: Nutrition progress bars change color: green (ok), yellow (near limit), red (exceeded)

features.name: History modal
features.description: Modal to view today's meal and exercise records
